mappings.reason: Allowlisting authorized software enforces a default-deny posture for application execution, addressing a subset of information system access configurations.
Allowlisting authorized libraries enforces a default-deny posture for library loading, addressing a subset of information system access configurations.
Allowlisting authorized scripts enforces a default-deny posture for script execution, addressing a subset of information system access configurations.
Implementing a firewall with a default-deny rule on end-user devices directly satisfies the deny-all objective for network traffic on this asset subset.
